name: incoming-watch
description: Poll INCOMING_MEDIA_DIR for new stable media files; notify Claude with a probe suggestion.

name: work-dir-space
description: Watch MEDIA_WORK_DIR free space; warn before encodes run out of room.

name: gpu-thermal
description: Poll nvidia-smi for temperature + sustained-load warnings so Claude knows before the GPU throttles.

name: stream-health
description: ffprobe LIVE_STREAM_URL every STREAM_POLL_SEC; notify on down/up/bitrate-drop transitions.

name: render-queue
description: Poll RENDER_QUEUE_URL (HTTP JSON) or RENDER_QUEUE_DIR (status sidecars); notify on job state transitions.

name: drm-license-health
description: Probe SHAKA_KEY_SERVER_URL; warn on auth failures or extended downtime.
